name: GolfPark
address: 7630 Little River Turnpike STE 150, Annandale, VA 22003
about: GolfPark is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines high-tech simulation with a social atmosphere. The facility features spacious practice bays equipped with advanced simulator technology designed for precision. They offer a range of services including lessons with PGA instructors, club fitting, and private simulator rooms for groups or events. Pricing operates on a pay-per-use model with optional membership plans, and the venue is known for its extended hours and weekend availability.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology with four high-speed camera sensors for precise shot tracking
Flexible booking system allowing sessions to be reserved well in advance
Social atmosphere with extended hours and late-night deals for food and drinks

food_and_drink.notes: Appetizers and full menu available, with 50% off during weekday happy hours
Draft beers available with half-price specials during weekday happy hours

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue also provides demo clubs for club fitting sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned as allowed, but the venue has a full bar and kitchen with food and drink options available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes varies depending on group size and simulator usage, but it typically takes around 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and offers a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all ages and skill levels.
